description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python CI that runs on every push and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions, including 3.5 through 3.9 and pypy3. For each version, check out the code, set up Python, install dependencies with poetry, run the test suite with py.test, perform type checks with pytest-mypy, verify the package format with twine, and upload coverage results to Coveralls.
